requirement_topic.en: Cell and Battery Pack Safety — ABNT NBR IEC 62133 under Portaria INMETRO 489/2018
requirement_topic.zh: 电芯与电池组安全——INMETRO第489/2018号法令下的ABNT NBR IEC 62133
requirement_topic.zht: 電芯與電池組安全——INMETRO第489/2018號法令下的ABNT NBR IEC 62133

summary.en: Portable lithium cells and battery packs placed on the Brazilian market must undergo compulsory INMETRO certification under Portaria INMETRO 489/2018, with testing to ABNT NBR IEC 62133 (the Brazilian adoption of IEC 62133, covering secondary lithium systems) performed in an INMETRO-accredited laboratory and certified by an accredited OCP (Organismo de Certificacao de Produtos). The conformity assessment is a third-party certification model: it includes product type testing, an initial factory audit, the affixing of the INMETRO conformity identification mark, and periodic maintenance audits and follow-up testing. The standard covers abuse testing (overcharge, short-circuit, crush, drop, thermal abuse, forced discharge) and electrochemical performance limits. Unlike the EU voluntary harmonised-standard route, ABNT NBR IEC 62133 testing within the INMETRO programme is mandatory, not a presumption-of-conformity option.
summary.zh: 投放巴西市场的便携式锂电芯及电池组，须依据INMETRO第489/2018号法令接受强制INMETRO认证，由INMETRO认可实验室按ABNT NBR IEC 62133（巴西采用的IEC 62133，涵盖二次锂体系）进行检测，并由认可的OCP（产品认证机构）出具证书。该合格评定为第三方认证模式：包括产品型式试验、初始工厂审核、加贴INMETRO合格标识，以及定期维持性审核和跟踪检测。该标准涵盖滥用测试（过充、短路、挤压、跌落、热滥用、强制放电）及电化学性能限值。与欧盟自愿协调标准路径不同，INMETRO项目下的ABNT NBR IEC 62133检测为强制要求，而非符合性推定选项。
summary.zht: 投放巴西市場的便攜式鋰電芯及電池組，須依據INMETRO第489/2018號法令接受強制INMETRO認證，由INMETRO認可實驗室按ABNT NBR IEC 62133（巴西採用的IEC 62133，涵蓋二次鋰體系）進行檢測，並由認可的OCP（產品認證機構）出具證書。該合格評定為第三方認證模式：包括產品型式試驗、初始工廠審核、加貼INMETRO合格標識，以及定期維持性審核和跟蹤檢測。該標準涵蓋濫用測試（過充、短路、擠壓、跌落、熱濫用、強制放電）及電化學性能限值。與歐盟自願協調標準路徑不同，INMETRO項目下的ABNT NBR IEC 62133檢測為強制要求，而非符合性推定選項。

standards_or_laws: ABNT NBR IEC 62133 — Safety requirements for portable sealed secondary lithium cells and batteries (Brazilian adoption of IEC 62133)
Portaria INMETRO 489/2018 — compulsory conformity assessment programme for lithium cells and batteries
INMETRO accreditation requirements for OCP (product certification bodies) and testing laboratories

summary.en: China's primary safety standards for portable lithium battery packs are GB 31241-2022 (Safety requirements for portable sealed secondary lithium cells and batteries for use in portable electronic equipment — revised edition) and GB 18287-2013 (General specification for lithium-ion batteries for mobile phones, under revision). GB 31241 is technically derived from IEC 62133-2 but contains national deviations in test severity and acceptance criteria. Testing by a Chinese CNAS-accredited laboratory to GB 31241 is NOT recognised by Brazilian INMETRO accredited OCPs or under the Portaria INMETRO 489/2018 conformity assessment pathway.
summary.zh: 中国便携式锂电池组的主要安全标准为GB 31241-2022（便携式电子设备用密封二次锂电芯及电池安全要求，修订版）和GB 18287-2013（手机用锂离子电池总规范，修订中）。GB 31241在技术上源自IEC 62133-2，但在测试严苛程度和验收准则方面存在国家偏差。中国CNAS认可实验室依据GB 31241出具的检测报告，在巴西INMETRO认可的OCP及INMETRO第489/2018号法令合格评定路径下不被认可。
summary.zht: 中國便攜式鋰電池組的主要安全標準為GB 31241-2022（便攜式電子設備用密封二次鋰電芯及電池安全要求，修訂版）和GB 18287-2013（手機用鋰離子電池總規範，修訂中）。GB 31241在技術上源自IEC 62133-2，但在測試嚴苛程度和驗收準則方面存在國家偏差。中國CNAS認可實驗室依據GB 31241出具的檢測報告，在巴西INMETRO認可的OCP及INMETRO第489/2018號法令合格評定路徑下不被認可。

standards_or_laws: GB 31241-2022 — Safety requirements for portable sealed secondary lithium cells and batteries for use in portable electronic equipment (SAC/SAMR)
GB 18287-2013 — General specification for lithium-ion batteries for mobile phones (SAC)

gap.en: Exporters must obtain compulsory INMETRO certification, not merely build a self-declared technical file. ABNT NBR IEC 62133 testing must be performed in an INMETRO-accredited laboratory and certified by an accredited OCP — third-party certification is mandatory, with an initial factory audit and periodic follow-up. Existing GB 31241 reports may support engineering analysis but do not establish Brazilian conformity and are generally not accepted by Brazilian OCPs as a substitute. Key gaps: (1) test severity and acceptance differences between GB 31241 and IEC 62133 in crush and overcharge tests; (2) Brazil requires the INMETRO conformity identification mark, registration in the INMETRO product database, and an in-country importer with a Brazilian CNPJ as certificate holder or co-holder; (3) Portuguese-language safety and identification labelling has no equivalent in Chinese domestic export requirements.
gap.zh: 出口商须取得强制INMETRO认证，而非仅建立自我声明的技术文件。ABNT NBR IEC 62133检测须在INMETRO认可实验室进行并由认可的OCP出具证书——第三方认证为强制要求，含初始工厂审核及定期跟踪。现有GB 31241报告可支持工程分析，但不能证明巴西符合性，巴西OCP通常不接受其作为替代。主要差距：（1）GB 31241与IEC 62133在挤压和过充测试的严苛程度及验收准则存在差异；（2）巴西要求INMETRO合格标识、在INMETRO产品数据库注册，以及由持有巴西CNPJ的境内进口商作为证书持有人或共同持有人；（3）葡萄牙语安全及标识标签在中国国内出口要求中无对应规定。
gap.zht: 出口商須取得強制INMETRO認證，而非僅建立自我聲明的技術文件。ABNT NBR IEC 62133檢測須在INMETRO認可實驗室進行並由認可的OCP出具證書——第三方認證為強制要求，含初始工廠審核及定期跟蹤。現有GB 31241報告可支持工程分析，但不能證明巴西符合性，巴西OCP通常不接受其作為替代。主要差距：（1）GB 31241與IEC 62133在擠壓和過充測試的嚴苛程度及驗收準則存在差異；（2）巴西要求INMETRO合格標識、在INMETRO產品數據庫登記，以及由持有巴西CNPJ的境內進口商作為證書持有人或共同持有人；（3）葡萄牙語安全及標識標籤在中國國內出口要求中無對應規定。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory legal obligation — Portaria INMETRO 489/2018 requires compulsory third-party certification to ABNT NBR IEC 62133 by an accredited OCP, with the INMETRO conformity mark, before placement on the Brazilian market; this is mandatory certification, not a voluntary presumption-of-conformity route
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for domestic market — GB 31241-2022 compliance required under SAMR framework for portable lithium batteries sold in China

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Brazilian market placement requires compulsory INMETRO certification under Portaria INMETRO 489/2018, with ABNT NBR IEC 62133 testing in an accredited laboratory, certification by an accredited OCP, the INMETRO conformity identification mark, and registration via an importer holding a Brazilian CNPJ. Unlike the EU, this is mandatory third-party certification rather than a voluntary harmonised-standard route. Chinese GB 31241 certification does not by itself satisfy the INMETRO conformity assessment, so exporters should arrange ABNT NBR IEC 62133 testing and OCP certification for the Brazilian programme.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 进入巴西市场须依据INMETRO第489/2018号法令取得强制INMETRO认证，由认可实验室按ABNT NBR IEC 62133检测、由认可的OCP认证、加贴INMETRO合格标识，并通过持有巴西CNPJ的进口商完成注册。与欧盟不同，此为强制第三方认证，而非自愿协调标准路径。中国GB 31241认证本身不能满足INMETRO合格评定，因此出口商应针对巴西项目安排ABNT NBR IEC 62133检测及OCP认证。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 進入巴西市場須依據INMETRO第489/2018號法令取得強制INMETRO認證，由認可實驗室按ABNT NBR IEC 62133檢測、由認可的OCP認證、加貼INMETRO合格標識，並通過持有巴西CNPJ的進口商完成登記。與歐盟不同，此為強制第三方認證，而非自願協調標準路徑。中國GB 31241認證本身不能滿足INMETRO合格評定，因此出口商應針對巴西項目安排ABNT NBR IEC 62133檢測及OCP認證。

source.publisher: INMETRO — Programa de Avaliacao da Conformidade (Portaria 489/2018)
